description: Send notifications to your own MessageBird SMS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise msgbird:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a MessageBird Messages API JSON body and post it to rest.messagebird.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-messagebird_sms

request.template: {"urls":"msgbird://${ customer_secrets.MESSAGEBIRD_SMS_APIKEY }/${ customer_secrets.MESSAGEBIRD_SMS_SOURCE }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"msgbird://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.source_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"recipients":["${ customer_secrets.MESSAGEBIRD_SMS_TO }"],"originator":"${ customer_secrets.MESSAGEBIRD_SMS_FROM }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}

{"recipients":["${ customer_secrets.MESSAGEBIRD_SMS_TO }"],"originator":"${ customer_secrets.MESSAGEBIRD_SMS_FROM }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}
